ACO_NUM ACO_NUM ACO_NUM Encrypted ACO Identifier. Format: A##### CHAR 6
NPI_Name NPI_NAME Name of Provider Associated with the NPI Name of provider associated with the NPI as recorded in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership System (PECOS) CHAR 100
